query:
UPDATE case_workflows 
        SET status = COALESCE(?1, status),
            assigned_to = COALESCE(?2, assigned_to),
            notes = COALESCE(?3, notes),
            completed_by = COALESCE(?4, completed_by),
            completed_at = COALESCE(?5, completed_at),
            updated_at = ?6
        WHERE id = ?7
